title: The Hero Returns
overview: Rovel is a hero who has spent ten years away from home, but sees it's time to return.

title: Vankreift Family Predicament
overview: With Rovel's return, the family must now come up with a plan on how to handle Agiel and her outrageous claims.

title: King Ravisel
overview: With the secret out, Rovel decides to introduce his family to everyone, especially to his mother.

title: Goddess Vár's Condemnation
overview: With Agiel gone, Sauvel can now bring his lover and daughter to the mansion. But things start to go wrong when Sauvel's lover, Aria meets Rovel, and she can't seem to keep her eyes off of him! Even so, they move forward with the wedding with the royal family present, and Ellen is forced to stay home for safety.

title: Feud between the Royal Family and the Spirits
overview: The Vankreift family goes through hard times with Aria's confession, as Ellen lays it out to declare war.

title: The Significance of the Spirit Festival
overview: Rovel and Ellen go to meet the King as they duke it out in the battle of wits, when a dark past is revealed.

title: The Curse of the Mines
overview: The Vankreift family must inspect the mines to create an excuse for how they acquired the gold, but...

title: Melancholy of Rafilia
overview: Rebellious Rafilia refuses to do her studies while her parents are focused on other matters instead...

title: The Healing Princess
overview: Ellen has powerful parents and can manipulate chemical elements—but is it enough to protect her family?

title: The Kidnapping Incident
overview: With Rafilia missing, Sauvel scrambles to find her whereabouts when the servant hands over a certain letter...

title: Ravisel's Intentions
overview: With Rafilia safely home, the Vankreift family must now deal with the one responsible for the incident.

title: Between Humans and Spirits
overview: Having angered Ellen, Ravisel must now face the consequences for his actions as the capital falls to chaos.
